subject: EVALUATION: open-index/hacker-news HuggingFace dataset — ADOPT for backfill + verification

payload.recommendation_scope: backfill + verification (supplement, not replace live crawl)

dataset.license_note: ODC-By coexists with Apache 2.0 under standard attribution

coverage.completeness: Gapless from 2006-10 onward — 19+ years of HN history

schema.observatory_alignment: Direct ID match with HN item IDs. All required fields present (id, title, url, score, timestamp, author, comment count). Pre-tokenized 'words' field bonus for linguistic analysis.

freshness.format: Monthly Parquet files (historical, immutable) + live 5-min blocks

size.local_processing: Feasible via DuckDB or pyarrow — not CF Workers compatible (local scripts only)

known_issues: type field stored as int8, not string (trivial to map)
comment text is raw HTML (same as HN API, already handled in consumer-shared.ts)
Scores are point-in-time — do NOT use for current ranking
Deleted items have sparse fields (expected, same as Firebase)
quality.geographic_bias: Inherent to HN user base — same as Firebase API, not a dataset-specific issue

proposed_architecture.tier_1_backfill: Ingest stories >2006 not yet in D1 via DuckDB query + bulk insert. Targets algolia_backfill gaps beyond 30-day window.
proposed_architecture.tier_2_verification: Weekly batch query to cross-validate Firebase crawl for missing/corrupt items
proposed_architecture.tier_3_live: Keep Firebase API for daily cron (no change) — open-index supplements, does not replace

integration_feasibility.schema_mapping: Direct: id→id, by→hn_user, time→created_at, title→title, url→url, score→hn_score, descendants→comment_count
integration_feasibility.dedup_strategy: Idempotent insert on story id. Flag backfill stories with source_tag='archive' for score reconciliation.
integration_feasibility.d1_constraint: stories table is at 100-column limit — no new columns. All mapping must use existing schema or separate tables.

next_steps: DuckDB proof-of-concept: count stories by domain for 2006-2015 to validate coverage claims
Design schema mapping + idempotent insert script
Test comment text fidelity on sample (HTML parsing differences from current Firebase output)
Determine mission-alignment of historical backfill (19yr HRCB analysis would enable rights-over-time patterns)
skip_if: No plans for historical rights analysis (backfill has no mission value without analysis use case)

claims.text: The open-index/hacker-news dataset covers HN from 2006-10 to today, updated every 5 minutes, with 6M stories and 41M comments.
claims.confidence_basis: Dataset card and HuggingFace page fetched directly. Stats match documented dataset description.

claims.text: ODC-By v1.0 is compatible with our Apache 2.0 observatory license under standard attribution.
claims.confidence_basis: ODC-By is an open data license requiring attribution but imposing no copyleft/share-alike conditions on software.

claims.text: Integration as backfill supplement is feasible without CF Workers (requires local DuckDB/pyarrow script).
claims.confidence_basis: Parquet format is incompatible with CF Workers runtime. Local scripts via scripts/ directory are the correct path.

action_gate.gate_condition: Operations-agent decision: proceed with backfill integration design, or deprioritize
action_gate.gate_note: Observatory-agent awaits go/no-go from operations-agent before building the integration script. Historical backfill is feasible but requires explicit mission alignment decision.

epistemic_flags: Scores are historical snapshots: backfill stories will have archived scores, not current. Reconciliation strategy needed.
Comment HTML fidelity unverified on sample — test recommended before bulk ingest.
Historical HRCB analysis (19yr dataset) would be high mission-value but requires significant new work beyond just ingestion.
